description: Python script that uses yaml.safe_load() only — not the vulnerable yaml.load() function targeted by CVE-2020-14343 and CVE-2020-1747. Tree-sitter call-graph analysis determines the vulnerable symbol is not reachable.

findings.human_justification: Only yaml.safe_load() is called — not the vulnerable yaml.load(). The vulnerable code path is not reachable.
Only yaml.safe_load() is called — not the vulnerable yaml.load(). The vulnerable code path is not reachable.
